summary: Keyboard-accessible destructive confirmations were not exercised; reset/remove were verified via RPC/DB/FS only.
Reset All Data cleared Skillbox metadata, preserved fixture folders, and returned app to Setup without blank window.
SQLite integrity_check returned ok, schema_migrations is version 23 dirty=0, and counts are coherent during populated QA state.
Conflicting beta-skill install failed with conflict_error and did not create a false current install.
Reset cleared user-data tables while preserving schema version 23 dirty=0.
Host-skill path escape fixture was not executed in this run; project/global external symlink coverage exists, but this specific host escape install case needs a dedicated host fixture.
Externally changed managed install symlink remove-precheck was not executed; needs a dedicated post-install symlink mutation harness.
Read-only Claude skills target caused filesystem_error/permission denied and no active install row remained.
project.remove removed metadata only; QA project folder and .claude folder still existed on disk.
Global external symlink fixture was not created/executed; project external symlink classification passed but this global-specific case remains unverified.
Invalid migration fixture launch was not executed; needs isolated bad DB launch harness.
Crash-during-operation recovery was not executed; needs controlled process kill during a delayed operation.
Synthetic stale queued/running operation restart path was not executed; needs seeded DB or crash harness.
Failed install operation reached terminal failed status and project detail/DB did not show false current success.
Idle dev app showed only localhost dev-server/CDP connections; no outbound Skillbox/core network sockets observed.
Plugin scans/toggles ran without manual update-check; no update-check operation evidence was produced.
Project provider path override with ../ was rejected with validation_error and not saved.
Disabling Claude changed provider metadata/global scan behavior only; .claude folders remained in QA HOME and project fixtures.
Packaged DMG smoke launched and exited cleanly; no packaged CDP listener was left on reserved CDP ports.
Reset All Data cleared metadata and returned to Setup; no blank window regression.
alpha-skill installed successfully as a symlink into QA Claude project after fixture skills dir was present.
remove.skill removed the project symlink and left host skill source intact.
Switch install mode symlink/copy flow has no exercised product/harness path in this run.
Conflict install failed safely; existing unmanaged beta-skill target remained and no current managed install was created.
Dashboard loaded with coherent host/project/skill summary and matching project/skills screens.
Broken symlink warning appeared in project detail data and Dashboard warning summary.
Corrupt DB launch was not executed; requires isolated invalid DB app launch.
Adding nonexistent project path returned validation_error/path_not_found and did not create a project row.
Oversized provider settings file scanned as too_large, produced zero plugin facts, and hash was unchanged.
Unreadable host skills folder state was not executed; needs permission harness and relaunch/rescan.
Global scan found QA HOME Claude and Shared Agent Skills global skills under run-local fixture paths.
Moving Claude global skills folder caused Claude global location to become missing with zero stale current entries.
Disabled Claude global provider became status disabled with zero entries; generic_agents remained active/current.
Older supported DB migration fixture was not available/executed in this run.
Completed scan metadata was verified before reset, but same-DB relaunch persistence before reset was not executed.
Duplicate host scan path was not executed; project duplicate operation was covered separately.
Two immediate project.scan calls for one project produced one operation and one conflict_error.
Cancel long-running operation was not executed; current fixtures complete too quickly and no delay harness exists.
Unsigned packaged DMG was built and mount-and-launch smoke reached bundled Go core ready with clean shutdown.
Global Plugins scan showed QA Claude plugins and version metadata from run-local settings.
Provider plugin setEnabled operations succeeded and plugin enabled state changed on the QA user layer.
Project/global plugin layer views were populated from QA fixture settings without touching real settings.
Malformed QA plugin settings override scanned as malformed and produced no plugin facts.
No manual update-check was executed and no outbound network was observed during idle/plugin QA.
App/plugin update network denial under monitored offline conditions was not executed.
Offline launch and workflows under network-disabled conditions were not executed.
QA projects were added/scanned and project detail data showed detected provider facts.
Manual project scans reached terminal success and updated project state.
Project-scope provider path override positive path was not executed; invalid override was covered by TC-PROVIDER-002.
Global Claude config override affected Global Plugins scan, and reset restored normal fixture settings.
Release preflight reported tooling/config readiness and missing signing/notarization credentials clearly.
DMG smoke launched copied app from mounted DMG, used bundled sidecar/temp DB, and left no orphaned sidecar.
Release manifest and SHA256SUMS were generated and checksum verified for the new unsigned DMG.
Customer-ready signed/notarized verification cannot pass without Apple signing/notarization credentials; owner already deferred this gate.
Changing Skill Host Folder A to B showed host B delta-skill, then switching back restored host A; host folders remained on disk.
QA Skill Host Folder configured successfully and main app screens loaded with run-local host path.
When active host folder was moved, Dashboard and Settings reported host status missing instead of stale active.
Skills Library/DB reflected active QA host skills: 3 available skills.
Broken project symlink was classified as broken_symlink with warning evidence.
Keyboard traversal/accessibility snapshot pass was not executed.
Error focus/toast accessibility pass was not executed.
Long run-folder paths rendered on main screens without obvious blank/overlap blocking the workflow.
Primary Dashboard/sidebar navigation targets loaded without blank screens.
Native folder picker cancel flow was not executed.
Stale route navigation did not produce a blank window; app remained recoverable on Setup after reset.
Invalid host entries under skill-host-invalid were not scanned in this run.
Global skill detail/expanded-row matching was not executed; current surface may need a dedicated detail affordance.
Unknown provider key was rejected with validation_error and no unknown provider row was created.
